description:
The fz-9pr arc made callsite outcomes first-class data, and then `fz dump --emit outcomes` made the model legible. Looking at real dumps surfaced three design seams the model still papers over.

This epic closes them in types, not edge-case code.

## The three seams

### 1. Descr lattice has outgrown `Const`

The reducer judges in lattice-space (`fold_make_closure`, `fold_make_tuple` produce `closure_lit`/`tuple_lit` Descrs) but materializes in IR-space (`Const` = scalars only). Where they don't line up, the fold silently dies ÔÇö the result is computed and thrown away because `is_scalar_literal` (ir_reducer.rs:500) rejects it and `literal_to_const` (ir_reducer.rs:513) has no arm.

Confirmed gaps: `closure_lit` (e.g. `fixtures/closure_typed_captures` ÔÇö `add_to(10,20)` survives as Emitted), `tuple_lit` (any fn returning `{:ok, n}` etc.). Empty list (`[]`, now a zero-alloc sentinel via fz-s9y) fits the same pattern.

Fix: one `descr_to_materialize(d, env) -> Option<Vec<Stmt>>` that owns the full vocabulary. Reducer asks one question, gets one answer.

### 2. Outcomes are snapshots when they should be traces

`CallsiteOutcome::Emitted { target }` records where we ended up, not how we got there. The typer promotes `Stalled { reason }` Ôćĺ `Emitted { target }` and drops the reason on the floor ÔÇö exactly the info needed to answer the central debugging question, "why didn't this fold?"

Fix: `Emitted { target, came_from: Option<StalledReason> }`. Trace-shaped, like provenance chains.

### 3. Producers don't tag outcome context

The reducer publishes outcomes for every body it walks (User, Prelude, fn_clause_N, lambda_N, k_*, etc.) without distinguishing them. The typer separately computes reachability (`FnTypes.reachable_blocks`) but doesn't tag outcomes. `dump_outcomes_pipeline` tries to stitch three truths at print time. `compute_survivors` in main.rs is a third independent computation of the same idea for pattern_check.

Fix: `FnIr.category: FnCategory` set at lowering. Typer's reachability lifted to module-level. Dump filters tagged data instead of stitching. `compute_survivors` deleted.

## What dies

- `literal_to_const` as a separate helper (folded into materializer).
- `is_scalar_literal`'s narrow gate (widened or replaced by materializer query).
- `compute_survivors` in main.rs.
- Three-truths-stitching in `dump_outcomes_pipeline`.

## The DAG

```
Arc 1 (sequential):    .1 Ôćĺ .2 Ôćĺ .3
Arc 2 (single):        .4
Arc 3 (mostly parallel): .5, .6 Ôćĺ .7 Ôćĺ .8
```

8 tickets, one commit each.

## Out of scope

- Enabling list literal folding (`fold_prim` skips `Prim::MakeList` at reducer.rs:188 because `list_of(elem)` loses length info ÔÇö needs IR-walking per the RED.3+ deferred comment). Filed separately.
title: Reducer + outcomes simplification ÔÇö close the lattice/IR and producer/consumer gaps
